answer: \boxed{Art is committed to the insane asylum because Fede and his girlfriend betray him by selling his idea for peer-to-peer music sharing to another tribe without his consent, leading Art to violently confront Fede in a fit of rage. To protect their deception and avoid legal or tribal repercussions, they stage his commitment as a preemptive measure to silence him. The asylum becomes a temporary prison while they execute their plan, unaware that Art will later escape and exploit their betrayal for his own advantage.}
